final_prompt.prompt:
Edit the logo image (reference #1) to look as if it is written with soy sauce, referencing the liquid texture and appearance from the second reference image (#2: 9e859b7a88bdd672dbac93b0ac1cd5e5).

风格/媒介: top-view / overhead angle, soy sauce as the writing medium
构图: top-down overhead view, logo text rendered as if poured or brushed in soy sauce
主体: the logo from reference #1, rewritten in soy sauce
场景/背景: flat surface viewed from above
光线/氛围: even overhead lighting consistent with a top-view food/liquid shot
色彩方案: deep amber-brown soy sauce tones, as seen in reference #2
材质/纹理: liquid soy sauce texture — glossy, slightly viscous, pooling edges — matching reference #2
文字(原样):
约束:
  preserve the letterforms and overall logo shape from reference #1
  soy sauce liquid style must match reference #2
避免: dry brushstroke interpretation; any non-liquid rendering of the text
